mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question_book ( user_id, question_id, subject_id, wrong_count, consecutive_correct, last_wrong_at, mastery_level, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{entry.userId}, #{entry.questionId}, #{entry.subjectId}, 1, 0, NOW(), 0, 'active', NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, consecutive_correct = 0, last_wrong_at = NOW(), status = 'active', updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE wrong_question_book SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
